professionalSummary: Machine Learning Engineer specializing in model development, optimization and edge AI deployment. Reduced SLM model size 5x (500MB → 100MB) via pruning, 8-bit LoRA, and INT8 quantization. Experienced in real-time computer vision pipelines (YOLOv8-seg) and embedded ML (TinyML/Arduino). Co-authored a deep learning research paper published in El-Cezeri Journal (2026). Top 10 finalist at the Pupilica AI Hackathon. I share my technical insights and project deep-dives on my personal blog.

experiences.title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Developed an "Apple Detection and Quality Analysis System" using YOLOv8-seg for real-time fruit detection and CIEDE2000 color quality analysis.
Designed and implemented a desktop GUI with PyQt5, integrating camera SDK, ML inference, and physical dimension measurement modules.
Trained and deployed computer vision models on embedded devices for real-time edge AI inference.
Implemented data preprocessing and model evaluation workflows for edge computing hardware, addressing real-world latency and resource constraints.

references.title: Postdoctoral Researcher, Computer Science, University of Nottingham
